scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && cd electron && npm run build && NODE_ENV=development ./node_modules/.bin/electron dist/main.js"
scripts.electron:build: npm run build:frontend && cd electron && npm run build && npx electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.electron:build:dmg: cd frontend && VITE_ELECTRON=true npx vite build && cd ../electron && npm run build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false SKIP_NOTARIZE=true npx electron-builder --mac dmg --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.electron:build:dmg:signed: cd frontend && VITE_ELECTRON=true npx vite build && cd ../electron && npm run build && npx electron-builder --mac dmg --config electron-builder.yml
